nodes.label: BOS (Break of Structure)
nodes.rationale: Trend continuation: a new structural extreme confirmed by three sequential filters — close-break (not wick), staircase extension beyond the prior BOS, and a real-bodied pullback pivot.

nodes.label: CHoCH (Change of Character)
nodes.rationale: Counter-trend break that flips trend only when sustained (persistence closes) beyond the reversal reference: validated_choch OR choch_origin (one-shot fallback) OR active (bootstrap fallback).

nodes.label: CHOCH_FAILED
nodes.rationale: A CHoCH is provisional until a same-direction BOS confirms it; a sustained break back through the CHoCH origin before that BOS flips trend back and resumes the original staircase from the genuine last BOS extreme (one-shot, no ping-pong).

nodes.label: LIQUIDITY_SWEEP
nodes.rationale: Counter-trend wick break that does not hold: a liquidity grab, trend unchanged; may re-anchor the CHoCH candidate to the swept extreme (sweep-then-expand pattern) but never the validated reference.

nodes.label: BOS Staircase
nodes.rationale: A continuation BOS must extend the leg beyond the previous BOS level; breaking a higher trailing low formed in a retrace is not structural. Seeded at each CHoCH with the CHoCH level so the first BOS of a leg cannot form on the wrong side of the CHoCH.

nodes.label: Trailing active_high/active_low references
nodes.rationale: Holding an old reference too long freezes one side and misses large moves on internal structure; trailing references track recent price action, at the accepted cost of needing pending_<side> promotion to preserve true leg extremes.

nodes.label: Persistence-based CHoCH confirmation
nodes.rationale: A single-candle poke that immediately reverts is a false break (sweep); a break must hold with persistence_candles consecutive closes beyond the reference to count as a real character change. Replaced volume-delta confirmation entirely.

nodes.label: Pullback confirmation + wick filter
nodes.rationale: A BOS is only emitted when an opposite-direction pullback pivot forms; bos_pullback_max_wick_pct=0.4 rejects single-candle wick 'pullbacks' that never retraced (the pivot-side wick must be <=40% of the range), keeping the pending BOS alive for a real-bodied pullback. The confirming pullback also seeds the CHoCH candidate.

nodes.label: Re-anchors (chain / staleness / min-gap)
nodes.rationale: On coarse timeframes a trend can lock with the reversal reference pinned at the leg origin; re-anchors pull it to a local extreme without flipping trend (the CHoCH still must confirm). They only tighten, refuse levels within 0.3% of price (hair-trigger CHoCH in chop), chain mode is establish-only, and reachable structural references (within the 4% release gap) are untouchable.

nodes.label: Impulse BOS staging
nodes.rationale: A clean impulse with no opposite pivots emits at most one deferred BOS, leaving an event-free stretch; advances displacing >1.5% beyond the prior BOS are staged in a separate list and deduped against real BOS — purely additive, state machine and CHoCH untouched (flag off = byte-identical output).

nodes.label: Leg-origin CHoCH reference
nodes.rationale: Every emitted BOS promotes the extreme its breaking leg launched from (pullback_ref) directly to the opposite validated_choch reference, marked structural: the close-break plus confirming pullback is itself continuation evidence. Structural refs resist re-anchors while within the 4% release gap; re-anchors write only into validated_choch so synthetic levels are never laundered into leg origins.

hyperedges.label: BOS three-filter confirmation chain (close-break, staircase, pullback, confluence)
